conservative.name: Devouring Grasp
conservative.requirements: Engaged with target; must have a free appendage (hand, tentacle, etc)

challenge.description: Effect: You grab your target and drag him inexorably to your mouth. While this action is recharging, your target cannot move, counts as engaged with you, and suffers to all checks except to escape. He can escape by making an Athletics (St) check or Coordination (Ag) check opposed by your Athletics (St). If the target is still in your grasp when this action recharges completely, you eat him. (He dies)

reckless.name: Devouring Grasp
reckless.requirements: Engaged with target; must have a free appendage (hand, tentacle, etc)

success.description: You hit the target for normal damage and grab hold!

challenge.description: Effect: You grab your target and drag him inexorably to your mouth. While this action is recharging, your target cannot move, counts as engaged with you, and suffers to all checks except to escape. He can escape by making an Athletics (St) check or Coordination (Ag) check opposed by your Athletics (St). If the target is still in your grasp when this action recharges completely, you eat him. (He dies)
